title: Product Marketing Manager
required_skills: GTM strategy execution in technical environment
Product positioning and value proposition development
matched_skills: GTM strategy (4 major product launches IPC, GTM plans GRG)
Product positioning and value proposition (IoT, ATM)
Cross-functional sales enablement (collateral, demo scripts, training)
missing_skills: A/B testing (explicitly named in JD, not in CV)
core_responsibilities: Develop, own and execute end-to-end GTM roadmap for Octimine (patent search platform)
Support GTM roadmap for Simple IP by quantitatively testing product positioning and messaging
Lead strategic marketing roadmap for APIs through partner marketing and co-branded campaigns
Apply data-first mindset with A/B testing, market analytics, performance metrics
Own all marketing collateral from digital landing pages to offline assets
Act as central interface between PMs, Marketing, and Sales for sales enablement
recommended_emphasis: Lead with B2B product marketing track record (GRG and IPC roles) matching GTM and launch execution
Highlight sales enablement depth: collateral, demo scripts, training materials across multiple product lines
Showcase data-driven mindset with Power BI PL-300 and KPI reporting experience
Position IPC IoT launch outcomes (4.6M CNY) as proof of impact-driven GTM execution
Add A/B testing or performance validation examples from any campaign work if available
Connect multi-market EMEA/Asia experience to multinational company culture emphasis
